title: 昇る初陽に咲く笑顔 3話 サニピのお正月

script.text: 五人揃って電車に乗るのも久しぶりだね

translations.en: It’s been a while since the five of us took a train together.

script.text: 最近は個人の仕事が増えて

translations.en: Recently we’ve had more solo jobs‚

script.text: バラバラで行動することが多いものね

translations.en: so we go in separate directions a lot.

script.text: こんな時間でも電車は動いてるんだね

translations.en: The trains are running even now.

script.text: お正月は初詣や初日の出を見に行く人が多いから

translations.en: Because a lot of people go out on New Year’s Day for the first sunrise or first shrine visit of the year.

script.text: 夜中でも臨時列車が走ってるのよ

translations.en: Extra trains are running even in the middle of the night.

script.text: おかげで間に合いそう……

translations.en: Thanks to them‚ it looks like we’ll be in time…

script.text: お正月の臨時列車、便利……

translations.en: Extra trains for New Year. That’s convenient.

script.text: 東京には夕方までに戻ればいいから

translations.en: We don’t have to get back to Tokyo until evening.

script.text: この分なら星見市でゆっくり過ごせそうね

translations.en: That should allow us to take our time in Hoshimi City.

script.text: みんなと一緒に初日の出を見るの、楽しみだな～

translations.en: I’m looking forward to seeing the first sunrise with you all.

script.text: 高台にとうちゃーく！

translations.en: Here we are at the hill!

script.text: さすがに一月の風は冷たいわね

translations.en: As expected‚ the January wind is icy.

script.text: もっと厚着してきた方が良かったかしら

translations.en: Maybe we should have dressed up warmer.

script.text: ですね。でも、太陽が出れば少しは暖かくなりそう……

translations.en: You’re right‚ but it’ll probably get a bit warmer once the sun comes up.

script.text: 日の出までお喋りでもしながら待ちましょう

translations.en: We can chat while we wait for sunrise.

script.text: そういえば、初日の出を見た後は……どうしよう？

translations.en: Come to think of it‚ what do we do after we see the sunrise?

script.text: すぐに東京に帰るの？

translations.en: Go straight back to Tokyo?

script.text: せっかく五人揃ってるんだから

translations.en: We’ve got all five of us together for a change‚

script.text: 他にもお正月らしいことをしようよ！

translations.en: so there must be something New Year-ish to do!

script.text: お正月らしいこと……

translations.en: What’s “New Year-ish”?

script.text: 羽根つき、かるた、書き初め、初詣……

translations.en: Battledore‚ karuta‚ first calligraphy of the year‚ first shrine visit…

script.text: そういえば、この近くに神社があったわね

translations.en: Now that you mention it‚ there’s a shrine near here.

script.text: あそこなら初詣出来るんじゃない？

translations.en: We could do our first shrine visit there.

script.text: じゃあ初日の出を見た後は、みんなで初詣をしよう！

translations.en: Okay‚ we’ll all make our first shrine visit after we see the first sunrise.

script.text: いいわね。そうしましょう

translations.en: Cool‚ let’s do that.

script.text: あ……空が明るくなってきたよ……

translations.en: The sky’s getting brighter.

script.text: 太陽が昇ってきた……

translations.en: The sun’s rising.

script.text: 初日の出……

translations.en: First sunrise…

script.text: わぁ……綺麗……

translations.en: Wow‚ that’s pretty…

script.text: 一面が光に染まっていく……

translations.en: The whole sky is filled with light.

script.text: ……サニーピース……

translations.en: …Sunny Peace…

script.text: え？　何か言った？　怜ちゃん

translations.en: Eh? What did you say‚ Rei-chan?

script.text: 前にサニピの特集記事で書かれていたことを

translations.en: I remembered something that was written once in

script.text: 思い出したの

translations.en: a feature article about Sunny Peace.

script.text: 太陽のような眩しさで観客を自然と笑顔にする

translations.en: “A light-filled idol group with a dazzling brightness like the sun

script.text: 光溢れるアイドルグループ。それがサニーピースだって

translations.en: which naturally makes the crowd smile. That’s Sunny Peace.”

script.text: 見る人を自然と笑顔にする眩しい光……

translations.en: A dazzling light that naturally makes watchers smile…

script.text: なんとなく初日の出に似てるわね

translations.en: That’s kind of like the first sunrise.

script.text: この景色みたいに

translations.en: I want to make the people who come to see us smile‚

script.text: 私達も観に来てくれたみんなを笑顔にしたいね

translations.en: just like this scene.

script.text: そうね……今日は来て良かったわ

translations.en: Yeah. I’m glad we came here today.

script.text: なんだか初心を思い出せた気がする……

translations.en: It’s reminding me of when we first started out…

script.text: うわぁ、結構人が来てるね

translations.en: Wow‚ there are a lot of people here.

script.text: お正月だからね

translations.en: Because it’s New Year’s Day.

script.text: 東京に比べたら全然少ないけど……

translations.en: Not nearly as many as in Tokyo though.

script.text: さあ、お参りしましょう

translations.en: So let’s go up to the shrine.

script.text: さくらは神様に何をお願いするの？

translations.en: What are you going to ask the gods for‚ Sakura?

script.text: そうだなぁ……

translations.en: Hmmm…

script.text: みんなと楽しい一年が過ごせますように、かな

translations.en: That I can spend the year with all of you‚ maybe.

script.text: さくららしいわね

translations.en: That’s just so Sakura.

script.text: 向こうにおみくじがあるわよ

translations.en: They’re selling fortune slips over there.

script.text: 参拝が終わったらみんなで引いてみましょう

translations.en: Let’s draw some after we pray.

script.text: やったぁ！　おみくじ、大吉だよ！

translations.en: Yess! My fortune slip says “excellent luck”!

script.text: 私も大吉だったよ

translations.en: Mine too.

script.text: 大吉……いい一年になりそう……

translations.en: “Excellent luck”… Looks like it’ll be a good year.

script.text: 私も大吉だわ。お正月は大吉が多く出るって言うわよね

translations.en: I got the same. They say “excellent luck” comes up a lot on New Year.

script.text: 遙子さんは？

translations.en: Haruko-san‚ what’s yours?

script.text: どうせ私は運が悪い女なのよ……

translations.en: Oh‚ I’m always unlucky…

script.text: おみくじなんて……おみくじなんて……

translations.en: You mean fortune slip‚ you…

script.text: は、遙子ちゃん！　気にしない気にしない！

translations.en: H-Haruko-san! Don’t worry about it!

script.text: ……あれ？　雫ちゃん、何飲んでるの？

translations.en: Eh? What are you drinking‚ Shizuku-chan?

script.text: 甘酒……あっちで配ってた……

translations.en: Amazake. They’re serving it over there.

script.text: 甘くてあったかくて美味しいよ

translations.en: It’s hot‚ sweet‚ and yummy.

script.text: さくらちゃんも飲んでみる？

translations.en: Would you like some?

script.text: 甘酒ってお酒だよね？　飲んだらまずいんじゃ……

translations.en: Isn’t amazake an alcoholic drink? We shouldn't drink…

script.text: これは米麹で作った甘酒だから

translations.en: This is sweet sake made from rice malt‚

script.text: アルコールは入ってないんだよ

translations.en: so there’s no alcohol in it.

script.text: 甘酒もいいけど、私は寒い日に飲むなら

translations.en: Amazake is nice too‚ but I’d rather have

script.text: 温かいコーヒーの方がいいかな～

translations.en: hot coffee on a cold day.

script.text: 米麹の甘酒は美容にいいってよく聞くわよね

translations.en: I often hear that amazake from rice malt is good for beauty.

script.text: 美肌効果とかアンチエイジングとか言われて……

translations.en: Skin improvement‚ anti-aging‚ that kind of thing…

script.text: ちょっと行ってもらってくるわね！

translations.en: I’m going to get some!

script.text: うーん……どれにしよう……

translations.en: Hmm… which one should I pick?

script.text: 千紗ちゃん、何を悩んでるの？

translations.en: What are you dithering about‚ Chisa-chan?

script.text: どのお守りにしようか迷ってて……

translations.en: I don’t know which charm to buy…

script.text: アイドルに御利益があるお守りってなんだと思う？

translations.en: What kind of charm would be beneficial for an idol?

script.text: えーと……商売繁盛、かな？

translations.en: How about one for “prosperous business”?

script.text: オーディションに合格祈願とかかしら

translations.en: Or maybe one to pass an audition?

script.text: 縁結びじゃない？

translations.en: What about one for connection?

script.text: お仕事やファンとのご縁は大事にしないとね

translations.en: Connections with work and with fans are important.

script.text: 無病息災……健康第一……

translations.en: Sound health… health first…

script.text: うう……余計に分からなくなっちゃったよ……

translations.en: There are so many‚ I don’t know anymore…

script.text: 初詣も終わったし、これからどうする？

translations.en: We’re done with the first shrine visit‚ so what do we do now?

script.text: 初日の出を見て初詣をして……

translations.en: We saw the first sunrise‚ and made the first shrine visit…

script.text: あとお正月らしいことって何かしら

translations.en: What else is New Year-ish?

script.text: お正月らしいこと……こたつでみかんを食べながら

translations.en: Something New Year-ish… Sitting around eating tangerines.

script.text: アイドルの出てる特番をだらだら観る……

translations.en: Flopping on the couch watching TV specials with idols in them…

script.text: 雫ちゃんがいつもどんなお正月を過ごしてたか

translations.en: Is that how you usually spend New Year’s Day‚ Shizuku-chan?

script.text: 一瞬でイメージ出来たよ……

translations.en: I can see that image instantly…

script.text: あとは、おせち料理やお雑煮を食べるとかかしら

translations.en: How about eating New Year dishes and rice cake soup?

script.text: なんの準備もしてないけど……

translations.en: But we haven’t got anything ready for that…

script.text: ……そうだ！

translations.en: …Got it!

script.text: それなら、みんなで私の実家に来てみない？

translations.en: How about you all come to my parents’ house?
